steps.title: Set up the subtraction and distribute the negative sign
steps.content:
Write out $a - b$ with the given expressions:

$$a - b = (3k + 5r) - (9k - 12r + 6)$$

Distribute the negative sign through $b$:
$$= 3k + 5r - 9k + 12r - 6$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Group by variable:
  • $k$ terms: $3k - 9k = -6k$
  • $r$ terms: $5r + 12r = 17r$
  • Constant: $-6$

The result is:
$$-6k + 17r - 6$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
